projects.title: My Projects
projects.description: Selected case studies showing how I approach product thinking, architecture, and delivery.
projects.recruiter_note: Each project highlights the context, my role, a key technical decision, and the observed outcome, including confidential work.
projects.no_projects: No projects available at the moment.
projects.private_project_hint: Sensitive details were sanitized, but I can explain architecture, trade-offs, and responsibilities in an interview.
projects.public_project_hint: This case includes public material available for direct browsing.

home.title: Software engineer focused on web products and backend systems with real business impact.
home.description: I build interfaces, APIs, and critical workflows with Java, Spring Boot, TypeScript, React, and Next.js. My work combines architecture, hands-on delivery, and product thinking to turn complex problems into reliable, scalable software.
home.trust_point_1_desc: Close to the business problem, the technical decision, and the actual implementation.
home.trust_point_2_desc: Experience building APIs, dashboards, and web experiences.
home.trust_point_3_desc: Projects described with focus on context, trade-offs and observed outcomes.
home.contact_description: I'm available to talk about opportunities, projects, and collaborations.
home.seo_description: Portfolio of José Almir featuring projects in Java, Spring Boot, TypeScript, React, and Next.js. Case studies focused on architecture, product thinking, and business impact.
home.seo_keywords: jose almir, portfolio, software engineer, java, spring boot, typescript, react, next.js, backend, full stack, software architecture
